LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT IMRAN MULLICK'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RE-FILE MOTION IF DEFENDANT FILES 1)APPROPRIATE DECLARATIONS AND POINTS & AUTHORITIES SUPPORTING HIS MOTION AND 2)A RESPONSE TO THE ORIGINAL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS REQUIRED UNDER THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2011 Vacated

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Mar-09-2011 Denied

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT IMRAN MULLICK'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Imran Mullick, 794-6666 deft & moving party in propria persona (did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of his intent to appear at the hearing; Court allowed argument & if reversed its tentative ruling would continue matter for pltf to appear); no other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Motion denied without prejudice to re-file motion if defendant 1)files appropriate declarations and points & authorities supporting his motion and 2)A response to the original motion for summary judgment as required under the Code of Civil Procedure. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER ATTACHING THE SEPARATE STATEMENT, AND AWARDING PLAINTIFF $29,196.10 (PRINCIPAL AND INTEREST) PLUS ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS OF $3,447.00. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2010 Set For Trial On Apr-04-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
